info.title: ServiceNow Table API (read-only subset)
info.description: Minimal read-only surface of the ServiceNow Table API fronted by the ARBITER AgentCore Gateway. Reads (record listing/filtering by sysparm_query, e.g. CMDB CIs by sys_class_name, and single-record fetch) go through the gateway so the ServiceNow API key is injected at the edge; writes deliberately stay on the servicenow_specialist's direct REST path.

get.summary: List records from a ServiceNow table
get.description: Query any ServiceNow table (e.g. cmdb_ci, cmdb_rel_ci, change_request, incident, problem, alm_asset) with an encoded sysparm_query filter such as sys_class_name=cmdb_ci_web_server.

parameters.name: tableName
parameters.description: ServiceNow table name, e.g. cmdb_ci, change_request, incident.

parameters.name: sysparm_query
parameters.description: Encoded query filter, e.g. sys_class_name=cmdb_ci_web_server or nameLIKEweb.

parameters.name: sysparm_fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.

parameters.name: sysparm_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: sysparm_display_value
parameters.description: Return display values (true), raw values (false), or both (all).

get.summary: Fetch a single record by sys_id

parameters.name: sysparm_fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return.
